## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? 1-3 bullet points. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat:` New feature
- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor:` Code change (no feature/fix)
- [ ] `chore:` Build, CI, dependencies
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation only

## Testing

- [ ] All CI checks pass
- [ ] Ran app locally and tested the affected flow
- [ ] No regressions in prayer time display, Qiblah, or settings

## Checklist

- [ ] SwiftLint and SwiftFormat pass (`swiftlint lint --strict` / `swiftformat --lint iqamah/`)
- [ ] New code has appropriate test coverage (domain logic ≥80%)
- [ ] No force-unwraps introduced outside suppressed dev-utility sections
- [ ] No sensitive data or API keys committed
